nasb.text: But for Your sake we are killed all day long; We are considered as sheep to be slaughtered.

esv.text: Yet for your sake we are killed all the day long; we are regarded as sheep to be slaughtered.

cnv.text: 為你的緣故，我們終日被置於死地； 人看我們如同將宰的羊。

ccb.text: 为了你，我们终日出生入死， 被视为待宰的羊。

csbs.text: 然而为你的缘故，我们终日被置于死地， 被看为要宰杀的羊。
